task_description: Enhance the Document Intelligence Agent with free models and OpenAI-compatible local LLM support. Adds: (1) OpenAI-compatible endpoint support for any local LLM (Ollama, LM Studio, LocalAI, vLLM), (2) Enhanced OCR with TrOCR/PaddleOCR/DocTR and ensemble voting, (3) Enhanced NER with HuggingFace transformers and LayoutLM, (4) Model ensemble orchestrator combining all free models, (5) Free model registry with health checking and graceful fallback.

verification.summary: All 162 tests pass (35 original + 127 new). Tests exercise real code paths with mocked ML dependencies. Graceful degradation, confidence-weighted merging, and configuration control are all tested. Imports verified for all new modules.
